basic_details.job_title: Central Railway Contract Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Central Railway has released the official Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. BB/P/GAZ/CMP/GDMO. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the Central Railway Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates not exceeding 60 years of age and possessing an MBBS qualification can participate in the walk-in recruitment process scheduled for 05 June 2026. The official notification PDF and complete walk-in details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: CMP/GDMO: Degree in Medicine i.e. MBBS (recognized by the Medical Council of India, included in the first or second schedule or part eleven, of the third schedule (other than the Licentiate qualifications to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956). Holders of educational qualifications in part II of the third schedule should also fulfil the condition stipulated in Section 13 (3) of the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. Satisfactorily completed the compulsory rotating internship. Preference will be given to those, who can join immediately.

salary_details.details: CMP/GDMO: Rs. 95,000/- per month Retired Railway Doctors: Rs. 95,000/- per month (subject to the condition that the remuneration plus pension shall not exceed the last pay drawn)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central Railway CMP (GDMO) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to appear for the interview on 05 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree recognized by the Medical Council of India and have satisfactorily completed a compulsory rotating internship.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) post is not exceeding 60 years as on the date of the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 95,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Contract Medical Practitioner (GDMO) post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Walk-in Interview followed by a Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at Sr. DPO's Office, Central Railway, Personnel Branch, Divisional Rly. Manager's Office, 2nd Floor, Annex Building, Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus, Mumbai-400001.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original certificates/testimonials and duly attested photocopies, along with their application form and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should report at 10:00 hrs and 12:00 hrs on the day of the interview.
